blurb:
⭐ **Featured Event: Southern-Fried Gaming Expo**
📅 July 31 through August 2 | Marriott Renaissance Waverly, Atlanta
🎟️ Paid admission | [Get Tickets](https://www.atlantaparent.com/event/southern-fried-gameroom-expo)

This one is for the parents who grew up in arcades and the teens who never got to. The Southern-Fried Gaming Expo takes over the Marriott Renaissance Waverly in Vinings, less than 20 minutes from East Cobb, with more than 300 arcade and pinball machines, retro consoles, tabletop games, and tournaments all weekend long. Everything is on free play once you're in, so you pay once and just go. It's loud, it's nostalgic, and it's genuinely one of the best ways to spend a weekend with a teenager who is hard to impress. Mark the calendar now — this one fills up.
scoring_notes: Exceptional demographic fit. The Waverly location is practically in East Cobb's backyard. The mix of nostalgia for Gen X parents (median age 42) and teen appeal matches this audience almost perfectly. Annual event with strong uniqueness. Free-play-after-entry model is a great value story for any income level. July dates are forward-looking but worth planting early.
